Who we work with

Built for patients who plan their treatment around a trip to Mumbai.

Whether you live abroad, are visiting India for a few weeks, or are flying in from another Indian city specifically for dental work — the planning workflow is the same. X-rays first. Written plan next. Then you book the trip.

🇬🇧 🇺🇸 🇨🇦

NRIs returning home

Visiting parents, attending a wedding, or already planning a Diwali trip — fit your dental work into the time you'll already be in Mumbai.

🇦🇪 🇸🇬 🇦🇺

International visitors

Expats and foreign nationals based anywhere from Dubai to Sydney — flying to India for unhurried, expert care at a fraction of home-country prices.

🇮🇳

Indians flying in from other cities

Patients from Bangalore, Delhi, Pune, Hyderabad and beyond who want a specialist team rather than the closest clinic.

👨‍👩‍👧

Families on one trip

Parents, partners, and children seen together so the schedule is efficient. Send everyone's X-rays in advance — we plan a combined timetable.

🦷

Specific-treatment travellers

Implants, full-mouth rehabilitation, smile design or aligners — patients who plan the trip specifically around the procedure that brings them.

📋

Pre-travel planners

You want certainty before you book a flight. Send your X-ray — we tell you exactly how long the work needs, whether it can be done in one trip, and what to expect.

Why patients choose 3A

A 40-year family practice that takes its time with each case.

Reasons our travelling patients tell us they came back, or referred a friend.

01

Family-led since 1983

Founded by Dr. Ashok Parekh four decades ago. Now run by him alongside his daughter-in-law Dr. Anuja (Periodontist) and son Dr. Amaey (Prosthodontist & Implantologist). The 3 A's are the doctors.

02

Three specialists, one chair

Complex cases — implants on someone with gum disease, full-mouth rehab in a patient who grinds — get the right specialist for each part of the treatment, in the same clinic, same family.

03

X-ray first, then a plan

Send recent X-rays on WhatsApp before you book the flight. We share a written pre-visit plan with realistic time, stages, and what's possible in your trip window.

04

Honest about staged work

Some treatments — implants, full-mouth rehab — need two trips for healing. We say so up front rather than rush a result. Your bone and gums need time, no matter how good the surgeon.

05

Trained for anxious patients

Dr. Amaey holds a Master's in Counselling Psychology alongside his MDS and is specifically trained in dental anxiety and phobia management. Tell us if it makes you nervous — we change how we plan the visit.

06

South Mumbai location

Walking distance from Charni Road station; short cab to Marine Drive, Opera House, Malabar Hill, Cuffe Parade. Most patients combine the visit with seeing family or being in the part of the city they were going to anyway.

What we treat

Treatments commonly planned around a Mumbai trip.

A focused list — what travelling patients most often come to us for. Anything not listed here is also available; ask us in your enquiry.

Implantology

Dental Implants

Single implants to multi-tooth replacements. International-grade titanium implants. Most cases need two trips — one for placement and healing, one for the final tooth — for predictable, lifetime-grade results.

Trips needed1–2 visits
Prosthodontics

Full-Mouth Rehabilitation

Comprehensive reconstruction — implants, crowns, occlusion work — for patients with extensive wear, missing teeth, or failed previous work. Always staged honestly across two trips.

Trips needed2 visits
Aesthetic

Smile Design & Veneers

Porcelain veneers, composite layering, and full smile makeovers. Mock-ups before any preparation — you see and approve the result before we touch a tooth.

Trips needed1 visit (7–14 days)
Prosthetic

Crowns & Bridges

Single crowns to multi-unit bridges. Zirconia, e.max, PFM — material chosen to match the tooth's role and your bite. Lab work coordinated to fit your travel window.

Trips needed1 visit (7–10 days)
Orthodontic · Invisalign Provider

Clear Aligners (Invisalign)

Certified Invisalign Provider. After your in-person scan and case setup in Mumbai, most of the aligner sequence can be managed remotely — perfect for patients who can only make one trip.

Trips needed1 visit + remote
Endodontic

Root Canal Treatment

Single-visit and multi-visit RCT depending on the tooth and infection. Magnification, rotary instrumentation, biocompatible obturation — and a crown plan to protect the tooth long-term.

Trips needed1 visit
Periodontics

Gum Care & Periodontics

Deep scaling, gum-graft work, and treatment of advanced periodontal disease — Dr. Anuja's specialty. Often the first step before implants, veneers, or any rehab can be done well.

Trips needed1 visit
Prosthetic

Dentures (Complete & Implant-Retained)

From conventional full dentures to implant-retained overdentures and All-on-4-style solutions. Designed for stability when you eat and speak, not just appearance.

Trips needed1–2 visits
TMJ Specialist

TMJ & Bite Management

Jaw pain, clicking, headaches, night-time grinding. Custom occlusal splints, bite analysis, and coordination with rehab work where the bite is the underlying problem.

Trips needed1 visit + remote
Family Care

Pediatric Dentistry

Children seen alongside parents on the same trip. Gentle, paced visits — first checkup, sealants, fluoride, fillings. We work hard to make their first dental memory a calm one.

Trips needed1 visit
Urgent

Dental Emergencies

Broken crowns, lost fillings, swelling, abscess, post-flight tooth pain — WhatsApp us. We make space for genuine emergencies and will tell you straight away whether it can wait until you're home.

ResponseSame-day (where possible)
Plan & Review

Consultation & Treatment Planning

Sometimes you just need a second opinion before you commit. We review your X-rays, listen to the full history, and give a written assessment — even if our recommendation is that you don't need most of what's been quoted to you.

FormatWhatsApp + in-person
How it works

Six steps from WhatsApp to wheels-up.

No deposit. No commitment. Just a clear plan before you commit to a flight.

1

Send your X-rays

WhatsApp +91 91188 33558 with your latest panoramic / CBCT and a clear photo of your smile. No appointment, no payment — just the images.

2

We review & reply

Within 24–48 hours we send a written pre-visit assessment: what's needed, what's optional, how many sittings, realistic timing.

3

Plan your travel window

Once you know the time required, you choose your dates. We block the chair and your sittings in advance — no waiting in the clinic once you arrive.

4

In-person consultation

Day one is a thorough in-chair examination. The plan from WhatsApp is confirmed or adjusted — and only then do you authorise the work to begin.

5

Treatment, paced for travel

Sittings are scheduled tightly so you finish in your trip window. For multi-trip cases, the next visit is booked before you fly home.

6

After-care, WhatsApp open

Written care guide, photos for your records, and the same WhatsApp number stays open for questions long after you've flown home.

Realistic timelines

How much time you'll actually need on the ground.

These are honest averages, not best-case marketing numbers. Your written plan will give your exact case.

TreatmentVisits to clinicDays in MumbaiTotal trips
Scaling, clean-up, single filling1–21–3 days1 trip
Root canal + crown3–45–10 days1 trip
Veneers / smile design4–67–14 days1 trip
Single implant + final crown3–4 over time2 visits, ~7 days each2 trips, 3–6 months apart
Multi-tooth implants / All-on-44–6 over time10–14 days each2 trips, 3–6 months apart
Full-mouth rehabilitation6–10 over time10–14 days each2 trips, 3–6 months apart
Clear aligners (Invisalign)1 setup visit, remote thereafter5–7 days1 trip + remote check-ins
Why some cases need two trips: Implants need 3–6 months for the bone to fully integrate before the final tooth is fitted. Full-mouth rehab needs the gums and bone to settle between staged work. Trying to compress this into one trip is the most common reason dental work fails 2–3 years later. We won't do it.
Location

203, 2nd Floor, Earth Darshan — Girgaon, South Mumbai.

Khetwadi Main Road, corner of 8th Lane, next to Hanuman Temple. You won't miss the backlit signage.

  • 6-minute walk from Charni Road railway station
  • Short cab to Marine Drive, Opera House, Malabar Hill, Cuffe Parade, Colaba
  • Hotels nearby: Trident Nariman Point, Taj Mahal Palace, Sofitel BKC (35 min)
  • 45 minutes from Mumbai International Airport (BOM) by cab

Meet the doctors

The three A's — one family, three specialists.

The 3 in our name is for Ashok, Anuja, and Amaey. We work together as a team — most patients are seen by more than one of us across a treatment plan.

Dr. Ashok R. Parekh

Founder · Dental Surgeon
  • BDS — Government Dental College, Mumbai
  • Founded 3A Dental Clinic in 1983
  • 40+ years of clinical practice in Girgaon
  • Treated over 5,000 patients across three generations of families

Dr. Amaey A. Parekh

Prosthodontist · Implantologist · TMJ
  • MDS (Prosthodontics & Implantology) — Nair Hospital Dental College, Mumbai
  • MAPC — Master of Arts in Psychology & Counselling
  • Trained in Dental Anxiety & Phobia Management
  • TMJ & bite-management specialist
  • Certified Invisalign Provider

Dr. Anuja A. Parekh

Consulting Periodontist
  • MDS (Periodontics) — Mumbai
  • Specialist in gum disease, grafts, and implant-site preparation
  • The first step in most complex rehab cases
  • Patient-side care for nervous and senior patients
A note for nervous patients

If the chair makes you anxious, please tell us.

Alongside his clinical postgraduate degree (MDS), Dr. Amaey holds a Master's in Counselling Psychology (MAPC) and has trained specifically in dental anxiety and phobia management. This is not a marketing line — it changes how the visit is scheduled, how long sittings run, how we communicate before and during procedures, and what we use to keep you comfortable. Patients who have avoided dental work for years are often the ones we work most carefully with.

A few quiet results

Clinical work — not transformation theatre.

Real cases from our practice, shown with patient consent. We don't post miracle marketing or before-and-afters from stock photos.

Full-Mouth Rehabilitation

Worn dentition · staged across two trips

Significant wear from years of grinding. Bite re-established, upper arch restored with crowns, lower stabilised. Two visits spaced four months apart.

Implant Rehabilitation

Senior patient · full lower arch

Multiple implants placed and restored across two trips. Patient flew in from abroad, returned home for the healing period, and came back for the final teeth.

Many cases are not photographed for the public, by patient preference. We share more relevant examples privately during your enquiry.
Private Cases

Shared on request

Veneers, implants, smile design — shared one-to-one with patients considering similar work, when consent has been given for direct sharing.

All cases shown with explicit patient consent. Individual results depend on case complexity, oral and general health, and adherence to after-care.

Honest answers

Common concerns from patients flying in.

The questions we get asked most by NRIs, international patients, and out-of-city travellers — answered the way we'd answer them on a call.

The technology, materials, and clinical training are international-grade — the same implant brands, the same ceramic systems, the same protocols. What changes is cost and the doctor's time per patient. We use the time difference for unhurried care, not to cut corners.
We provide a written care guide, photos, and clinical records for any future dentist. WhatsApp stays open. Most adjustment issues are minor and resolvable remotely or with your local dentist. For warranty-related work on crowns or implants, we'll guide you through next steps case-by-case.
You see a written treatment plan before you commit. If we think a less expensive option works equally well for you, we say so — sometimes that means recommending a filling instead of a crown, or saving a tooth rather than extracting and implanting. Second-opinion patients sometimes leave with a plan that's smaller than the one they arrived with.
For implants and full-mouth rehab — usually no. The bone needs months to integrate with implants. Rushing that is the single biggest reason expensive dental tourism work fails 2–3 years later. We will tell you up front if your case needs two trips, even if a competing clinic has promised one.
Yes — we routinely see whole families on a single trip. Parents, partners, children, grandparents. Send everyone's X-rays in advance and we plan a combined schedule. Senior patients with medical history are managed in coordination with their physician where needed.
Tell us before you travel. Diabetes, blood thinners, recent heart procedures, immunosuppression — all change how we plan surgical work, but rarely rule it out. We coordinate with your physician where appropriate. Skipping this conversation is unsafe.
Patient photos are never shared publicly without explicit consent. Many of our best cases are never seen by the public, by patient preference. You decide.
A standard panoramic dental X-ray (OPG) from any dental clinic or diagnostic centre is enough to start. Phone-camera photos of paper X-rays are usually readable. If you can get a CBCT scan, even better — but it's not required for the initial assessment.
Pricing philosophy

We share costs after we've seen your X-ray — not before.

Most travelling patients find Mumbai dental work costs a fraction of what they would pay in the UK, US, UAE, Singapore, or Australia. But quoting numbers without seeing your case is how patients end up surprised at the chair. Send your X-ray, get a written plan with line-by-line costs, then decide.

What happens next

  • You send the form — WhatsApp opens with your details pre-filled.
  • Attach your X-ray (panoramic or CBCT) and any smile photos in WhatsApp.
  • Within 24–48 hours: a written pre-visit assessment from Dr. Amaey.
  • If it makes sense, we book sittings around your travel dates.
  • No deposit, no commitment, no sales calls.

Your details go directly to our WhatsApp — nothing is stored on this page.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions.

Send your most recent X-ray (panoramic or CBCT) and a clear photo of your smile on WhatsApp at +91 91188 33558. We review and share a written pre-visit plan. You book the trip after.
No. We see NRIs, international visitors, and Indian patients travelling from other cities — all on the same pre-visit X-ray workflow.
Usually two trips spaced 3–6 months apart so the bone and gums heal. The exact case timing is in your written plan.
Most patients find Mumbai dental costs are a fraction of what they would pay back home. We share a precise cost breakdown with your written plan rather than publish comparative figures.
Yes. Dr. Amaey holds a Master's in Counselling Psychology alongside his MDS and is trained in dental anxiety and phobia management. Tell us before the visit — we change how we plan it.
Yes, we are a certified Invisalign Provider. Aligner cases can often be set up in Mumbai during one trip and managed remotely thereafter.
203, 2nd Floor, Earth Darshan, Corner of 8th Lane, Khetwadi Main Road, next to Hanuman Temple, Girgaon, Mumbai 400004. 6 min walk from Charni Road station. 45 min cab from Mumbai International Airport.
Yes — parents, partners, children all on one trip. Send everyone's X-rays in advance and we build a combined schedule.

Written care guide and WhatsApp support after treatment. Minor issues often resolvable remotely with a local dentist; for warranty-related adjustments we'll guide you case-by-case.
